Title: Create a new user
Preconditions: None
Test Steps: 1. Call the constructor to create a new Utente object with the provided data.
Expected Result: - A new Utente object is created with the specified attributes.

Title: Set password for an existing user
Preconditions: A Utente object exists with Id = 1
Test Steps: 1. Call the setPassword method on the existing Utente object with the new password.
Expected Result: - The password attribute of the Utente object is updated to "newpassword456".

Title: Get email for an existing user
Preconditions: A Utente object exists with Id = 1
Test Steps: 1. Call the getEmail method on the existing Utente object.
Expected Result: - The method returns the email "test@example.com".

Title: Create a new product
Preconditions: A Utente object exists with Id = 1
Test Data:
- Nome: "Product A"
- Luogo: "Italy"
- Descrizione: "A great product"
- Immagine: "product_a.jpg"
- Prezzo: 99.99
- Proprietario: Utente with Id = 1
Test Steps: 1. Call the constructor to create a new Prodotto object with the provided data.
Expected Result: - A new Prodotto object is created with the specified attributes and associated with the given Utente object.

Title: Set product name
Preconditions: A Prodotto object exists with Nome = "Product A"
Test Steps: 1. Call the setNome method on the existing Prodotto object with the new name.
Expected Result: - The nome attribute of the Prodotto object is updated to "Product B".

Title: Get product price
Preconditions: A Prodotto object exists with Prezzo = 99.99
Test Steps: 1. Call the getPrezzo method on the existing Prodotto object.
Expected Result: - The method returns the prezzo value 99.99.

Title: Create a new signal
Preconditions: A Utente object exists with Id = 1 and another Utente object exists with Id = 2
Test Data:
- Tipo: True
- Titolo: "Inappropriate Content"
- Descrizione: "This product contains inappropriate content."
- Utente Segnalato: Utente with Id = 2
- Autore: Utente with Id = 1
Test Steps: 1. Call the constructor to create a new Segnalazione object with the provided data.
Expected Result: - A new Segnalazione object is created with the specified attributes and associated with the given Utente objects.

Title: Set signal title
Preconditions: A Segnalazione object exists with Titolo = "Inappropriate Content"
Test Steps: 1. Call the setTitolo method on the existing Segnalazione object with the new title.
Expected Result: - The titolo attribute of the Segnalazione object is updated to "Spam Product".

Title: Get signal author
Preconditions: A Segnalazione object exists with Autore Id = 1
Test Steps: 1. Call the getAutore method on the existing Segnalazione object.
Expected Result: - The method returns the Utente object with Id = 1.

Title: Invalid email format
Preconditions: None
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to call the constructor to create a new Utente object with the invalid email.
Expected Result: - An error occurs due to the invalid email format.

Title: Negative product price
Preconditions: A Utente object exists with Id = 1

- Nome: "Product C"
- Luogo: "Spain"
- Descrizione: "A bad product"
- Immagine: "product_c.jpg"
- Prezzo: -10.00
- Proprietario: Utente with Id = 1

Expected Result: - An error occurs due to the negative price value.
